messages.content: rewrite: Teaching staff are not entitled to paid annual leave because they are entitled to paid summer and winter holidays.
Teaching staff do not receive additional paid annual leave as they already receive paid summer and winter holidays.
rewrite: Teaching staff are entitled to have paid summer and winter holidays
Teaching staff have the right to paid summer and winter holidays.

rewrite and make it more simpler: Compensation leave that generated by overtime work shall be used before 31st August of each academic year. Generally, this cannot be carried forward to next school year. If the staff give up taking compensation leave, there will be no compensation is offer. Exceptional circumstances will be reviewed by the Principal on case by case basis.

Overtime compensation leave must be used by August 31st each year and cannot be carried over to the next year. If staff do not take their compensation leave, they will not receive any compensation. The Principal will review any exceptional circumstances on a case-by-case basis.

rewrite: Teaching Staff will be occasionally required to support school activities on weekends, approx. 4-6 times per academic year, less than 8 hours per time, on a rotating basis
b. 教学员工需参加Professional Development: 1学年2次，周末全天
Teaching Staff will be required to attend PD days, twice per school year, a full Saturday

Teaching staff will need to assist with school activities on weekends, approximately 4-6 times per academic year, for less than 8 hours each time, on a rotating basis. In addition, teaching staff are required to attend two full-day Professional Development sessions on Saturdays during the school year.

rewrite: Attendance adjustment request can ONLY be submitted for up to 3 times each month（regardless of punch in or punch out）
Attendance adjustment request needs to be submitted within 7 days, OR he/she will be considered as absent from work

An attendance adjustment request can only be submitted up to three times per month, regardless of clocking in or out. The request must be submitted within 7 days, or the individual will be marked as absent from work.
rewrite: If there is any emergency, please wechat, phone call, SMS to your leader/Principle/HR, and submit your application within 1 working day after you complete your filed work.
In case of an emergency, please contact your leader/principal/HR via WeChat, phone call, or SMS. Submit your application within one working day after completing your field work.

rewrite: 
1. Please select corresponding application item according to your daily work requirement. 
Should you have any concerns, please contact FIN Manager (Miu He).
2. Relevant payment (payroll excluded) will be made every Wednesday, please your arrangements accordingly.

1. Please choose the appropriate application item based on your daily work needs. If you have any questions, please contact FIN Manager (Miu He).
2. Payments for relevant expenses (excluding payroll) will be processed every Wednesday. Please plan your arrangements accordingly.

rewrite: Mainly work uniform on daily basis, formal or business casual attire are accepted. 
When attending special events, relevant dress code should be followed.
For daily work, the main attire is the uniform. Formal or business casual dress is also acceptable. For special events, please adhere to the specified dress code.
rewrite: Eligibility : All the Chinese and Foreign staff who have passed probation before 31st August and still in service on 10th October of current academic year.
Eligibility: All Chinese and foreign staff who have completed their probationary period before August 31st and are still employed on October 10th of the current academic year.
rewrite: Appraisal cycle: Commences on the 1st September of current academic year till 31st August of next academic year
Appraisal cycle: Begins on September 1st of the current academic year and ends on August 31st of the following academic year.
rewrite: For more HR policies, please refer to School’s share drive (policies will be updated from time to time, please refer to HR email notification)
For additional HR policies, please consult the School's shared drive. Policies will be periodically updated, so please refer to HR email notifications for any changes.

rewrite: Mission: To nurture the sacred heart in every child to become a creative, caring and passionate learner.

Philosophy: Recognition of uniqueness of each child and family, loving interaction and care could develop children full potential, and full recognition of  all the teachers’ knowledge and their hard working

Mission: Our goal is to cultivate the sacred heart in every child, fostering creativity, compassion, and a love of learning.

Philosophy: We acknowledge the individuality of each child and family. Through nurturing interactions and care, we believe that children can reach their full potential. We also value the expertise and dedication of our teachers.
